title: Rubio visits the Caribbean as Trump’s Iran gambit nears tipping point
author: Adam Taylor
fullText: Marco Rubio attended a regional summit to emphasize the Trump administration’s focus on the Western Hemisphere even as the prospect of conflict in the Middle East looms.
summary: Marco Rubio attended a regional summit to emphasize the Trump administration’s focus on the Western Hemisphere even as the prospect of conflict in the Middle East looms.
